deploy.startCommand: python manage.py flush --no-input && python manage.py loaddata data.json && python manage.py setup_plans && python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; U=get_user_model(); U.objects.filter(username='superadmin').delete(); U.objects.create_superuser(username='superadmin', email='admin@stadispace.co.ke', password='Admin@StadiSpace2026!'); print('Superuser ready')" && gunicorn backend.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --timeout 120
